mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LABOR_CONTRACTS ( WORKPLACE_ID, EMPLOYEE_USER_ID, STATUS, CONTRACT_START_DATE, CONTRACT_END_DATE, WORKPLACE_NAME, WORKPLACE_ADDRESS, OWNER_NAME, EMPLOYEE_NAME, JOB_DESCRIPTION, WORK_DAYS, WORK_START_TIME, WORK_END_TIME, BREAK_MINUTES, WAGE_TYPE, HOURLY_WAGE, MONTHLY_WAGE, DAILY_WAGE, PAYMENT_DAY, USE_NATIONAL_PENSION, USE_HEALTH_INSURANCE, USE_EMP_INSURANCE ) VALUES ( #{workplaceId}, #{employeeUserId}, #{status}, #{contractStartDate}, #{contractEndDate}, #{workplaceName}, #{workplaceAddress}, #{ownerName}, #{employeeName}, #{jobDescription}, #{workDays}, #{workStartTime}, #{workEndTime}, #{breakMinutes}, #{wageType}, #{hourlyWage}, #{monthlyWage}, #{dailyWage}, #{paymentDay}, #{useNationalPension}, #{useHealthInsurance}, #{useEmpInsurance} )
mapper.select: SELECT ID, WORKPLACE_ID, EMPLOYEE_USER_ID, STATUS, CONTRACT_START_DATE, CONTRACT_END_DATE, WORKPLACE_NAME, WORKPLACE_ADDRESS, OWNER_NAME, EMPLOYEE_NAME, JOB_DESCRIPTION, WORK_DAYS, WORK_START_TIME, WORK_END_TIME, BREAK_MINUTES, WAGE_TYPE, HOURLY_WAGE, MONTHLY_WAGE, DAILY_WAGE, PAYMENT_DAY, USE_NATIONAL_PENSION, USE_HEALTH_INSURANCE, USE_EMP_INSURANCE, OWNER_SIGNED_AT, EMPLOYEE_SIGNED_AT, SENT_AT, REJECTED_REASON, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM LABOR_CONTRACTS WHERE ID = #{id}

SELECT ID, WORKPLACE_ID, EMPLOYEE_USER_ID, STATUS, CONTRACT_START_DATE, CONTRACT_END_DATE, WORKPLACE_NAME, WORKPLACE_ADDRESS, OWNER_NAME, EMPLOYEE_NAME, JOB_DESCRIPTION, WORK_DAYS, WORK_START_TIME, WORK_END_TIME, BREAK_MINUTES, WAGE_TYPE, HOURLY_WAGE, MONTHLY_WAGE, DAILY_WAGE, PAYMENT_DAY, USE_NATIONAL_PENSION, USE_HEALTH_INSURANCE, USE_EMP_INSURANCE, OWNER_SIGNED_AT, EMPLOYEE_SIGNED_AT, SENT_AT, REJECTED_REASON, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM LABOR_CONTRACTS WHERE WORKPLACE_ID = #{workplaceId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT ID, WORKPLACE_ID, EMPLOYEE_USER_ID, STATUS, CONTRACT_START_DATE, CONTRACT_END_DATE, WORKPLACE_NAME, WORKPLACE_ADDRESS, OWNER_NAME, EMPLOYEE_NAME, JOB_DESCRIPTION, WORK_DAYS, WORK_START_TIME, WORK_END_TIME, BREAK_MINUTES, WAGE_TYPE, HOURLY_WAGE, MONTHLY_WAGE, DAILY_WAGE, PAYMENT_DAY, USE_NATIONAL_PENSION, USE_HEALTH_INSURANCE, USE_EMP_INSURANCE, OWNER_SIGNED_AT, EMPLOYEE_SIGNED_AT, SENT_AT, REJECTED_REASON, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM LABOR_CONTRACTS WHERE EMPLOYEE_USER_ID = #{employeeUserId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE LABOR_CONTRACTS SET STATUS = 'CANCELLED' WHERE ID = #{id} AND STATUS IN ('DRAFT', 'SENT')
